isolation.scope: Validate only extension pending tool lifecycle assertion

assertions.title: Pending tool lifecycle is end-to-end visible

steps.action: Poll cycle 1 in VAL-EXT-004 test fixture
steps.expected: pending tool call appears with waiting status while run phase is executing_tool
steps.observed: Assertion verifies phase executing_tool, pendingToolCalls length 1, toolName search_files, status waiting

steps.action: Poll cycle 2 in VAL-EXT-004 test fixture
steps.expected: pending list clears when tool dispatch progresses and run phase becomes model_streaming
steps.observed: Assertion verifies pendingToolCalls length 0 and phase model_streaming

steps.action: Poll cycle 3 in VAL-EXT-004 test fixture
steps.expected: run completes with no pending tool calls
steps.observed: Assertion verifies phase completed and pendingToolCalls length 0

frictions.description: Default unit-test reporter output did not include assertion ID lines, so an additional verbose rerun was required to capture explicit VAL-EXT-004 evidence.
frictions.resolution: Executed supplemental command with --reporter=verbose and extracted the tagged line into an evidence file.

summary: Validated 1 assertion (VAL-EXT-004): pass. Required unit test command exited 0; supplemental verbose rerun exited 0 and captured assertion-tagged lifecycle evidence.
